remarks: Welcome to the historic James Benedict House, one of Wilton's most notable and beautifully preserved 18th-century residences. This thoughtfully updated antique Colonial seamlessly blends timeless craftsmanship with modern convenience, offering 2,803 square feet across three full levels-including a true third floor with tall ceilings (not an attic)-plus a walk-out lower level ready to be finished.  Set on an exceptional 4.81-acre property with a private pond, this rare offering provides unmatched privacy, scenic beauty, and the opportunity to create your own walking trails-all within one of South Wilton's most desirable locations.  Property Highlights  4 Bedrooms | 2 Full Baths | 1 Half Bath 10 total rooms across three full levels True third floor with full ceiling height Walk-out lower level with finishing potential Central chimney with 5 fireplaces (3 gas, 2 wood-burning) Classic post-and-beam construction Refinished wide-plank hardwood floors Two staircases to the upper level Spacious eat-in kitchen  Recent Upgrades & Enhancements  Fully painted interior and exterior Updated bathrooms with modern finishes LED lighting throughout Brushed gold fixtures, hardware, and accents New backsplash Upgraded Decora-style switches and outlets (many with dimmers)
